zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilda de Burghersh於1321年出生在英國素可布瓦申時，她的父親Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh34歲，母親Countess Elizabeth de Verdun16歲。她於大約1344年與John Grey結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年1月23日在英國奧可福爾亨利--坦斯享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilda de Burghersh于1321年出生在英国素可布瓦申时，她的父亲Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh34岁，母亲Countess Elizabeth de Verdun16岁。她于大约1344年与John Grey结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年1月23日在英国奧可福爾亨利--坦斯享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilda de Burghersh was born in 1321, in Burwash, Sussex, England, her father, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, was 34 and her mother, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, was 16. She married John Grey about 1344. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 23 January 1387, in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 66.

Elle a épousé John Grey environ 1344. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 janvier 1387, à Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Burghershが1321年にイギリススセックスブルワッシュで生まれた時，父Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghershは34歳，母Countess Elizabeth de Verdunは16歳であった。約1344年にJohn Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年1月23日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘンリー-オン-サムスで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Burghersh(이)가 1321년 영국 수세스 버와시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Elizabeth de Verdun(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1344년 John Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 1월 23일 영국 스퍼드실르 헨리--섬스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilda de Burghersh nasceu em 1321, em Burwash, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, tinha 16 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilda de Burghersh родилась в 1321 г. в местности бурваш, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Grey около 1344 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 января 1387 г. в местности хенли-он-тамесь, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.
